keywords.job: I am the captain of the emperor's personal bodyguards.
keywords.shop: I am the captain of the emperor's personal bodyguards.
keywords.name: My name is Tulf Beardweaver, son of Earth, from the Dragoneaters.
keywords.dwarfs: If you go to a dwarfs' city, do as the dwarfs do.
keywords.monster: I doubt anyone can make it through our lines of defense.
keywords.dungeon: I despise the habit to challenge the prisoners of Dwarcatra or provoke the boys in the mines.
keywords.mines: The mines aren't meant for foreigners. The miners there have enough troubles.
keywords.bodyguard: We keep up law and order here, though the boys would rather need some practice like taking care for the trouble in the mines.
keywords.trouble: The mines are raided again and again by the bandits of the Horned Fox.
keywords.horned: It's a renegade minotaur who has a hidden lair somewhere near our mines.
keywords.fox: It's a renegade minotaur who has a hidden lair somewhere near our mines.
keywords.lair: The lair of the Horned Fox is surely well guarded and even better hidden.

texts: I am the captain of the emperor's personal bodyguards.
